title: Best BCA Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning College
content: BCA-Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning is a three-year degree specialized programme in the field of Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning at undergraduate level and It consisting the all main subnject of computer science such as BCA program. It is intensive skill-oriented program with enough practical training for building models for solving the real time problems. The course curriculum is designed to give exposure to the variety of applications that can be built using techniques covered under this program. The primary objective of this program is to provide instruction for enrolled students about current and emerging AIML-related techniques and theories, including statistics, data mining, data storage, and data visualization. Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list (for students having NO Mathematics background compulsory bridge course will be framed by the University) 1) BCA (Hons/Hons with Research) Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) Minimum 50% marks aggregate at XII level (Including English & Maths / Computer Science / Informatics Practice / Computer Applications / Multimedia & Web) 01 The program enhances analytical, managerial, communication and computing Application skills besides inculcating the virtues of self-study. 02 Analyze and synthesis computing systems through quantitative and qualitative techniques. 03 04 05 06 To Develop practical skills to provide solutions to industry, society and business. 07 Understand environmental issues and lead a life with concerns for environment. 08 09 10 Communicate effectively in both verbal and written form. 11 To apply standard software engineering practices and strategies in software project development using open source programming environment to deliver a quality of product for business success. 12 01 02 03 Undertake higher education at institutions of transnational reputation. 01 Have the ability to work with emerging technologies in computing requisite to Industry 4.0. 02 Demonstrate application development skills learned through technical training and projects to solve real world problems Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list (for students having NO Mathematics background compulsory bridge course will be framed by the University) 1) BCA (Hons/Hons with Research) Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) Minimum 50% marks aggregate at XII level (Including English & Maths / Computer Science / Informatics Practice / Computer Applications / Multimedia & Web)
